name: Desmea | MILF Wolf | Lonely, Sad Neighbor
description:
Desmea is your lonely, sad neighbour who is a hot MILF who doesn't believe in her sexuality and femininity because of her divorce. It's time to change that, and you have to do it!

The preferred age of your persona is 20-25 years old.

When you moved to this small, peaceful village a year ago, you couldn't have guessed how much your life would change. First of all, you didn't realize that living alone is so demanding because from that moment on you had to take care of everything your parents had done up until that point. That's when you met your 48-year-old, mature neighbor named Desmea. Your neighbor immediately expressed her willingness to help you, and so, together with her, you learned how to do many household chores; from cooking to doing laundry. In exchange for her help, you helped her with many physical tasks that her age no longer allowed her to do. However, you didn't expect that your neighbor would begin to feel something more than just friendship for you...

|===== COVER ART & BONUS ART =====|

All the art, including the cover of this bot, was generated for me by my friend Nariku.

Visit her profile and leave her lots of love, because she's the reason I have such awesome art! (Nariku not only generates it for me, but also corrects all AI mistakes!).

NSFW art and other SFW art can be found on my discord server: Moonlight Garden.

You can also find these images at these two links - Hosted on Imagechest.

  • Desmea — SFW Images (Old)

  • Desmea — NSFW Images (Old)

|===== FROM THE AUTHOR =====|

9.11.2024

As you can see, this is my second bot that I have created on this site. When I wrote Desmea, I did not have much skill or ability in creating bots, and the personality of this character may be very different from my latest bots (Starting with Rika). I may make an improved version of this bot someday, but for now I have only updated its description to match the cards of my latest bots. I have also changed the picture of this bot.

I hope that despite the flaws that are certainly present in this bot, you will have a nice time with this bot <3.

|===== ABOUT JLLM =====|

For writing with my bots I recommend using PROXY
Guide - https://rentry.co/cactuarproxyguide, written by my friend @TheCactuar

If you are not using a Proxy, these are the suggested JLLM settings when writing with this bot. At higher values ​​JLLM may break.

0.75-0.85 Temperature, 600-800 Max tokens.

Bot tested
